scripts.test:ci: concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend" "npm run wait-and-test" --kill-others --success first
scripts.test:responsive: concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend" "wait-on tcp:5001 tcp:5000 tcp:5173 && npm run seed && playwright test tests/responsive.spec.js" --kill-others --success first
scripts.wait-and-test: wait-on tcp:5001 tcp:5000 tcp:5173 && npm run seed && playwright test
